schema_note: Canonical public URLs for agents and buyers. Regenerate: npm run docs:sync-endpoints (reads repo-root .env). Commit result for GitHub Pages. Stable HTTPS + mainnet alignment: documentation/PUBLIC_MAINNET_OPERATIONS.md

endpoints.label: T54 XRPL x402 seller (discovery origin)
endpoints.description: Discovery appends each SKU path from x402_providers.json. With unified Caddy, base URL ends with /t54.

endpoints.label: Base USDC x402 seller (facilitator / Bazaar)
endpoints.description: Full GET /x402/v1/query URL for Coinbase Bazaar / x402 clients.

endpoints.label: Base USDC intake resale (same packs as T54 XRPL)
endpoints.description: GET /x402/v1/intake-resale?pack_id=<uuid>. USDC settles to X402_SELLER_PAY_TO. Override URL with X402_INTAKE_RESALE_PUBLIC_URL.

endpoints.label: Marketplace HTTP (Stripe MPP, buyer API, webhooks)
endpoints.description: Unified reverse proxy exposes /webhooks/stripe, /v1/*, /marketplace/* on this origin when using Caddy + ngrok.

endpoints.label: MCP T54 x402 (SSE, remote clients)
endpoints.description: FastMCP SSE: stream GET .../mcp/sse, POST .../mcp/messages/. Run local server on 127.0.0.1:9051; Caddy maps /mcp to it. Set MCP_SSE_PUBLIC_URL to https://<your-tunnel-host>/mcp for Agent.ai.
